header: How Apple unified global launch reporting

client_logo.title: Apple logo
client_logo.description: Fortune 500 #4 company logo for demo customer content.

description: Apple's operations teams spent two days a week reconciling launch metrics across regions. We replaced that with live dashboards wired straight to their planning systems. Within a quarter, reporting dropped from 16 hours to under 5, and every market now sees the same numbers in real time.

image.title: Product team reviewing dashboards

image.description: Unsplash image used as demo case study cover photography.
